title: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Direct Reduction Reactor
content:
Client Name: Tenovo HYL
Specification: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Direct reduction reactor (Energiron ZR project)
Year: 2020
Size: Ø 6701 mm X 19946 mm T.L. to T.L. (Vertical)
Design Pressure / Temperature: 10.5 Kg/cm2 @ Design Temp. 260 °C
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
